title: NeoMTR
description: Fully-automatic and realistic railway system. This is a fork of Minecraft Transit Railway v3.
body:
# ⚠️ WARNING: Not yet production-ready
**For now, DO NOT use this mod for servers, or worlds you plan to put lots of effort into!**  
**DO back up your existing save before loading it with this mod!**  
We're still developing this, so future backward compatibility with current version might not be guaranteed.  

# ⚠️ 警告: 本模组暂时还不适合生产环境
**现在来说，先不要将其用于服务器，或者计划长期建设的存档！**  
**要将已有的 MTR 存档在此模组下加载时，请先备份！**  
本模组还在开发过程中，所以可能不保证未来版本模组能向后兼容地加载现在版本模组创建的存档。

---

# NeoMTR
A fork of [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) v3.x that runs on a newer Minecraft version, with some additional features.

## Major new features
- 1.21.1 support
- NTE built-in
- "Virtual" manual driving system
- Vehicle sway
- Custom destination, individual settings for PIDS, Map and train display
- Generic one-way gate
- Server-side train simulation keeps working at low TPS
- Some more miscellaneous fixes
